content_body: The pool table was very much enjoyed by our family. We were very pleased with the layout of the cabin and its decor. The furniture and beds were very comfortable. We'd like to return for a visit in the fall when the weather is cooler so we can enjoy sitting out on the porch by a warm fire. Thanks for sharing your cabin with us.
title: Family Getaway in the North Georgia Mountains with Cabin Rentals of Georgia
